name: Trade Flow and OBI Compound
hypothesis: Combining realized trade flow (signed trade imbalance) with resting order flow (OBI) creates a more robust signal than either alone. The z-scored trade imbalance captures momentum from executed trades, while OBI captures latent pressure. This combination should yield high-quality signals.
mutation_note: New spec inspired by smoke test results in prior_iterations_index.md, aiming to create a diverse, high-expectancy signal by combining primitives from different families (trade-flow and book-state).
